message:
agent: Add ANSI escape code rendering via Ghostty WASM

- New AnsiOutput component using ghostty-web's VT100 parser
- Lazy WASM loading (singleton), cell-to-HTML span conversion
- Detects ANSI codes in bash output and routes to AnsiOutput
- Handles bg color blocks, default color exclusion, CR/LF normalization
- Graceful fallback: strips ANSI and shows plain text while loading

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/qnokuk7sdq7zayw26rscol0g
